name: chrX_Xp11_22_ATRX_SD
description: Xp11.22 region around the ATRX gene; contains a complex ~200 kb pericentromeric SD with paralogs on chrX (Xq13), chr3p11, and 16p11 derived from the ATRX-Y promoter region. Misalignment causes ATRX false-positive variant calls in short-read pipelines.

architecture.internal_structure: Intronic ATRX SDs plus 16p11 and 3p11 dispersed paralogs at >97% identity.
